stemHtml: Select the scenario that best illustrates the main advantage of executing a pre-flight check and planning.

options.a: A pilot performs only a quick check and later finds he has insufficient fuel to reach a suitable alternate, leading to a critical situation.
options.b: A pilot continues a flight despite noticing a minor oil leak during climb, resulting in a forced landing.
options.c: A pilot skips the weather briefing because conditions look good visually and later encounters unexpected icing.
options.d: A pilot completes full flight planning, realizes the forecast crosswind at destination will exceed aircraft limits, and cancels the flight to depart the next morning when conditions improve.
